title: Elrood Quarry Corporation
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Elrood Quarry Corporation''' was an [[Elrood/Legends|Elrood]]-based [[Mining/Legends|mining]] corporation. They owned the mineral mines on [[Bodrin]] and acted as the [[Planet/Legends|planetary]] government.

{{Company-stub}}

==Sources==
*<!-- 1993-09-XX -->''[[Planets of the Galaxy, Volume Three]]''
*<!-- 1994-11-XX -->''[[The Star Wars Planets Collection]]''
